messages.content:
Can you help me write this email.
Thank you for considering our services.I have attached the quotation and agreement for your review to this email.The agreement has 9 pages, please check the details carefully, if you have any questions regarding these agreements, please feel free to contact me,
If everything is in order, please let me know, we will prepare the original document for you to sign.
Regarding the consent letter, Can you send us a scan copy of you company name reservation document, due to we need to submit the mentioned document to the building for them to issue the consent letter.

Dear [Client],

I hope this email finds you well. I would like to express my gratitude for considering our services. We are excited to work with you and provide the best solutions for your needs.

I have attached the quotation and agreement to this email for your review. The agreement consists of 9 pages, so please check the details carefully. If you come across any questions or concerns regarding the agreements, please feel free to contact me at your convenience, and I will be more than happy to assist you.

If everything appears to be in order, please let me know, and we will prepare the original document for you to sign. We aim to make the process as seamless as possible, and we will work hard to ensure that it is just that.

Regarding the consent letter, could you please send us a scanned copy of your company name reservation document? We need this document to submit it to the building, which will allow them to issue the consent letter.

Thank you for your attention, and please do not hesitate to reach out if you need any further assistance.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
what should i reply to a customer who want to terminate offce. Can you write me an example thank you email for using our services for quite long time

Sure, here's an example email you can send to a customer who wants to terminate your office services while also thanking them for their loyalty:

Dear [Customer],

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing in regards to your request for termination of our office services. We are always sorry to hear that a valued customer like you will no longer require our services, but we certainly appreciate the opportunity we have had to serve you.

We want to take this opportunity to express our gratitude for your loyalty and for choosing our services for such a long time. We believe that we have provided you with the best services we could offer over the years, and we are grateful to have played a part in contributing to your business growth.

We understand that sometimes businesses change, and needs evolve. Therefore, it is with a heavy heart that we accept your decision to terminate our services. On behalf of our team, I would like to thank you for your trust in us and assure you that we are available to assist you with any challenge you may encounter in the future.

We will work diligently to ensure that the termination process goes smoothly. Please let us know if there is anything we can do to help with this transition. It has been our pleasure to serve you, and we wish you all the best in your future endeavors.

Thank you once again for being a part of our community.

Kind regards,

[Your Name]
Can you add a sentence say " since the customer terminate early before antrat expire we won't return deposit

Certainly, here's the modified email with the added sentence:

Dear [Customer],

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing in regards to your request for termination of our office services. We are always sorry to hear that a valued customer like you will no longer require our services, but we certainly appreciate the opportunity we have had to serve you.

We want to take this opportunity to express our gratitude for your loyalty and for choosing our services for such a long time. We believe that we have provided you with the best services we could offer over the years, and we are grateful to have played a part in contributing to your business growth.

We understand that sometimes businesses change, and needs evolve. Therefore, it is with a heavy heart that we accept your decision to terminate our services. On behalf of our team, I would like to thank you for your trust in us and assure you that we are available to assist you with any challenge you may encounter in the future.

However, as you have terminated your contract early before the end date, we regret to inform you that we won't be able to return your deposit. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

We will work diligently to ensure that the termination process goes smoothly. Please let us know if there is anything we can do to help with this transition. It has been our pleasure to serve you, and we wish you all the best in your future endeavors.

Thank you once again for being a part of our community.

Kind regards,

[Your Name]
can you add, we will be able to return only office access card and key when you return those keys after move out, please provide us your bank account details for us to return back money

Sure, here's the modified email with the added sentences:

Dear [Customer],

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing in regards to your request for termination of our office services. We are always sorry to hear that a valued customer like you will no longer require our services, but we certainly appreciate the opportunity we have had to serve you.

We want to take this opportunity to express our gratitude for your loyalty and for choosing our services for such a long time. We believe that we have provided you with the best services we could offer over the years, and we are grateful to have played a part in contributing to your business growth.

We understand that sometimes businesses change, and needs evolve. Therefore, it is with a heavy heart that we accept your decision to terminate our services. On behalf of our team, I would like to thank you for your trust in us and assure you that we are available to assist you with any challenge you may encounter in the future.

However, as you have terminated your contract early before the end date, we regret to inform you that we won't be able to return your deposit. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

Please note that we will be able to return only the office access card and the key when you return them to us after your move-out. Also, please provide us with your bank account details, so that we can easily transfer the remaining balance to your account.

We will work diligently to ensure that the termination process goes smoothly. Please let us know if there is anything we can do to help with this transition. It has been our pleasure to serve you, and we wish you all the best in your future endeavors.

Thank you once again for being a part of our community.

Kind regards,

[Your Name]
How to react to customer say on email that he oi sick

If a customer has emailed you to inform you that they are sick, it is important to first express your concern for their well-being. Here's an example response:

Dear [Customer],

I am sorry to hear that you are sick. I hope that you feel better soon and that you are able to recover fully.

Please do not hesitate to let us know if there is anything that we can do to support you during this difficult time. If there are any services that you need to be postponed or rescheduled, we would be happy to accommodate your request.

We value your business and your health, and we want to ensure that you are fully taken care of. Please take the time you need to get better, and know that we are here for you when you are ready to resume our services.

Wishing you speedy recovery.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

How to say no to this request Can I have a contract without Internet or with a cheap internet option? 99% of the time I won’t be in that office and I don’t need internet. And if I really need internet then I can use a wireless hotspot from my phone.

Dear [Customer],

Thank you for your email and for considering our services. We appreciate your interest in our office space.

Unfortunately, as our services include a full package that caters to all of our clients' needs, we are unable to offer contracts without internet. Our services are designed to provide comprehensive support, and as a result, the inclusion of internet is necessary to ensure the smooth running of our services.

However, we do offer different internet packages that cater to various preferences and budgets. You may consider taking the basic package when you find the need for internet access or otherwise, you can use a wireless hotspot from your phone.

Please let us know if there is anything else we can do to help you, and we would be happy to discuss alternatives with you.

Thank you again for your interest in our services.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

can you add that, we already offer lot of free item such as,  Company signboard and company registration document  which we need to pay this amount to building owner to get consent letter 3,500THB/set. We will give you 3 set. one for DBD, one for revenue, and another one for spare for those business who need to apply for special licence

Sure, here's the modified email with the added paragraph:

Dear [Customer],

Thank you for your email and for considering our services. We appreciate your interest in our office space.

Unfortunately, as our services include a full package that caters to all of our clients' needs, we are unable to offer contracts without internet. Our services are designed to provide comprehensive support, and as a result, the inclusion of internet is necessary to ensure the smooth running of our services.

However, we do offer different internet packages that cater to various preferences and budgets. You may consider taking the basic package when you find the need for internet access or otherwise, you can use a wireless hotspot from your phone.

We also want to inform you that, as a part of our service, we already offer many free items, such as the company signboard and company registration documents. These are items that we would need to pay an additional fee of 3,500THB per set to the building owner to obtain the necessary consent letter. We provide our clients with three sets, one for the Department of Business Development (DBD), one for the Revenue Department, and a third set that serves as a spare for those businesses that need to apply for a special license.

We hope that these free items will further support your business needs.

Please let us know if there is anything else we can do to assist you. We remain at your service.

Thank you again for your interest in our services.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

can you edit this 
I guarantee that you can use this address for VAT registration. I and Khun Mayura will be working together to assist when the audit officer from the revenue department comes to visit to check.If you are unable to register VAT due to Shinei fault /mistake we will give you a refund.

Sure, here's the edited version:

I would like to assure you that our address is suitable for VAT registration purposes. If you require any assistance during the registration process, I and Khun Mayura will be working together to support you, especially when the audit officer from the revenue department visits for inspection. 

Also, please be advised that in the unlikely event that Shinei makes any mistakes or errors in the VAT registration process that prevent you from successfully registering, we will be pleased to provide you with a refund. We strive to provide reliable and efficient service and support to all of our valued clients, and we take full responsibility for any potential issues that may arise.

Please let us know if you require any further information or assistance.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

how to say we are unable to giving more any discount due to we already offer lot of free item in the package such as, Company signboard and company registration document which we need to pay this amount to building owner to get consent letter 3,500THB/set. We will give you 3 set. one for DBD, one for revenue, and another one for spare for those business who need to apply for special licence

Here's an example email response:

Dear [Customer],

Thank you for considering our services and for your interest in our package. We appreciate your inquiry, and we understand that cost is a significant factor in making a decision.

Please note that we have already included many valuable features in our package, such as the company signboard and company registration documents. These are items that we need to pay an additional fee of 3,500THB per set to the building owner to obtain the necessary consent letter. As part of our package, we provide our clients with three sets, one for the Department of Business Development (DBD), one for the Revenue Department, and a third set that serves as a spare for those businesses that require a special license.

Therefore, we regret to inform you that we are unable to provide you with any further discounts at this time, as we have already included many valuable features in our package to ensure that our clients receive the highest level of support and service.

We hope that you will understand our position, and we remain available to answer any other questions you may have. Please feel free to reach out to us at your convenience.

Thank you once again for your interest in our services. We appreciate the opportunity to provide you with a comprehensive package that will meet all of your needs.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

Can you edit this.
Yes , To complete the agreement, we will need the customer Mr. Okazawa to sign with a witness.
If the details in the agreement is ok for the customer, can you give me customer contact details such as email and telephone number? So I can fill in the agreement on page 4 to make the original document ready for customer to sign?

May I ask how customer would like to proceed with the original document?
If customer is in oversea, we also accept a pdf a scan copy. We will send a pdf file of the agreement with our auhorized signature and customer can sign and send back the file to us.

Sure, here's the edited version:

Thank you for confirming that the agreement details are satisfactory. To proceed with the agreement, Mr. Okazawa will need to sign the document with a witness.

To prepare the original document, may I ask for Mr. Okazawa's contact details, such as his email and telephone number? We will then fill in the agreement on page 4 with the necessary information and send the final version to Mr. Okazawa for his signature.

Please let us know how Mr. Okazawa would like to proceed with the original document. If he is currently overseas, we also accept scan copies in PDF format. We will send a PDF file of the agreement with our authorized signature and Mr. Okazawa can sign and send the file back to us.

Thank you for your cooperation and we look forward to the completion of this agreement.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
